negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing optional-work demotion behavior: no WorkClass::Obligations skip with empty obligation set and no unified execution break policy.
related_but_insufficient_code: The only demotion references in the port are normal txpool promotion/demotion comments and metrics structs; payload builder has no BuildPolicyState or WorkClass gates.

rationale: The later obligation-specific candidate refines the broader policy-demotion behavior without replacing the rest of the optional-work demotion model.
statement: BuildPolicyState may demote optional payload work: obligation computation is bypassed with an empty obligation set when WorkClass::Obligations is skipped, and unified execution can stop when policy says the relevant work class should break.
suggested_falsification_tests: Configure BuildPolicyState to skip WorkClass::Obligations with due obligations in parent state and assert no obligation scan or obligation-derived transactions occur.
Configure a policy break for the unified execution work class and assert the unified loop stops at the demoted index instead of processing all entries.
summary: Build-policy optional work demotion is absent.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Configure a policy to skip obligations with due parent-state obligations; current payload builder has no policy object to bypass obligation scanning.
title: Build policy can demote optional payload work
